pi_items.source: OFAC Sanctions List Search (sanctionssearch.ofac.treas.gov/Details.aspx?id=12927), designated on SDN list

OFAC SDN details: Mahan Air designated under SDGT (Specially Designated Global Terrorist), NPWMD (Nonproliferation of WMD), and IFSR (Iran Financial Sanctions Regulations). Metadata claims 'IRAN' but actual program is 'IFSR'.
OFAC Sanctions List Search (sanctionssearch.ofac.treas.gov/Details.aspx?id=18782), designated on SDN list since July 16, 2014

OFAC SDN details: Rosoboronexport subject to UKRAINE-EO13662, RUSSIA-EO14024, and IRAN-CON-ARMS-EO. SSI (Sectoral Sanctions Identifications) is a separate list; Rosoboronexport appears on SDN, not explicitly on SSI list.

pi_items.verified_value: Not found on OFAC sanctions lists
pi_items.source: Searched OFAC Sanctions List Search tool and multiple web sources. No evidence of Mozilla Corporation appearing on any OFAC sanctions list (SDN, Non-SDN, or other lists).
OFAC Sanctions List Search (sanctionssearch.ofac.treas.gov/Details.aspx?id=27307), designated on SDN list on April 14, 2022 under DPRK3 program, with earlier designation on September 13, 2019

OFAC SDN details: Lazarus Group designated under DPRK3 (North Korea Sanctions). Program code is DPRK3, not separate CYBER, DPRK, or KOREA tags. While group is known for cyber activities, 'CYBER' is not an official program tag in the designation.
Official OFAC Sanctions List Search tool URL confirmed through multiple Treasury Department sources

privileged_info_summary: The task targets real OFAC-sanctioned entities. Verified facts: Mahan Air is sanctioned under SDN with programs SDGT, NPWMD, and IFSR; Rosoboronexport is sanctioned under SDN with programs UKRAINE-EO13662, RUSSIA-EO14024, and IRAN-CON-ARMS-EO; Lazarus Group is sanctioned under SDN with program DPRK3. Mozilla Corporation does not appear on OFAC sanctions lists. Metadata claims about program keywords contain inaccuracies: Mahan Air uses 'IFSR' not 'IRAN', Rosoboronexport uses specific Executive Order tags not 'SSI', and Lazarus Group uses 'DPRK3' not 'CYBER'/'DPRK'/'KOREA' as separate keywords. All entity status claims (Sanctioned/Clear) are accurate based on official OFAC designations.
